<noinclude>
Usage:
<pre>
{{Card
| name      = Ratchanter
| type      = Minion
| element   = Dark
| tribe     = Rat
| cost      = 4
| attack    = 15
| hp        = 30
| range     = 0
| rules     = Activated: pay 2 mana to conjure a Common Rat and buff it.
| flavor    = The rats listen, and the rats remember.
| keywords  = Sacrifice, Summon
| art       = Ratchanter.png
| patch     = 0.4.2
| stable_id = ratchanter
| deckable  = true
}}
</pre>

This template renders a card infobox AND emits SMW property annotations in a
single pass. Phase 1 sample only — Phase 3 sync_cards.py will drive it from
data/cards/*.json automatically.
</noinclude><includeonly>{| class="gt-card gt-element-{{lc:{{{element|}}}}}" style="float:right; width:280px; border:2px solid #222; border-radius:10px; background:#1a1a1a; color:#eee; font-family:sans-serif; margin:0 0 1em 1em;"
|-
! colspan="3" style="padding:6px 10px; background:{{#switch:{{lc:{{{type|}}}}}|minion=rgb(180,140,60)|magic=rgb(30,140,120)|react=rgb(160,40,100)|#default=linear-gradient(90deg,#333,#111)}}; border-radius:8px 8px 0 0; text-align:center; position:relative;" | <span style="position:absolute; left:10px; top:50%; transform:translateY(-50%); background:rgb(30,100,220); border-radius:50%; width:40px; height:40px; border:2px solid rgb(30,25,20); display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; color:white; font-family:'Inter',system-ui,sans-serif; font-weight:900; text-transform:uppercase; font-size:16px; -webkit-text-stroke:3px black; paint-order:stroke fill;">{{{cost|?}}}</span> <span style="font-size:1.2em; font-family:'Source Sans 3','Source Sans Pro',sans-serif; font-weight:700; -webkit-text-stroke:1px black; paint-order:stroke fill;">{{{name|{{PAGENAME}}}}}</span> <span style="position:absolute; right:10px; top:50%; transform:translateY(-50%); background:{{#switch:{{lc:{{{element|}}}}}|wood=rgb(102,187,106)|fire=rgb(220,40,30)|earth=rgb(140,100,40)|water=rgb(25,118,210)|metal=rgb(120,120,135)|dark=rgb(130,50,180)|light=rgb(240,220,40)|#default=rgb(128,128,128)}}; border-radius:50%; width:40px; height:40px; border:2px solid rgb(30,25,20); display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; color:white; font-family:'Inter',system-ui,sans-serif; font-weight:900; font-size:9px; text-transform:uppercase; white-space:nowrap; letter-spacing:0; -webkit-text-stroke:3px black; paint-order:stroke fill;">{{{element|?}}}</span>
|-
| colspan="3" style="padding:0;" | [[File:{{{art|CardBack.png}}}|280px|center|link=]]
|-
| colspan="3" style="padding:4px 10px; background:#222; border-top:1px solid #444;" | <span style="color:#888; font-size:0.85em;">Type</span> <span style="float:right;">[[{{{type|Minion}}}]]</span>
|-
| colspan="3" style="padding:4px 10px; background:#222;" | <span style="color:#888; font-size:0.85em;">Element</span> <span style="float:right;">[[{{{element|Neutral}}}]]</span>
{{{meta_rows|}}}
|-
| colspan="3" style="padding:8px 10px; min-height:60px;" | {{{rules|}}}{{#if:{{{flavor|}}}|<hr style="border:0;border-top:1px dashed #555;"/><span style="color:#888;font-style:italic;">{{{flavor}}}</span>}}
|-
{{#if:{{{attack|}}}|
{{!}} style="padding:6px 10px; background:#111; border-radius:0 0 0 8px; text-align:left; font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif; font-weight:900; text-transform:uppercase; -webkit-text-stroke:1px black; paint-order:stroke fill; font-size:1.1em; color:rgb(200,50,32);" {{!}} {{{attack}}}🗡️
{{!}} style="padding:6px 10px; background:#111; text-align:center; font-family:'Inter',system-ui,sans-serif; font-weight:600; font-size:0.75em; color:#888; letter-spacing:1px;" {{!}} {{#if:{{{range|}}}|{{#ifeq:{{{range}}}|0|MELEE|RANGE {{{range}}}}}}}
{{!}} style="padding:6px 10px; background:#111; border-radius:0 0 8px 0; text-align:right; font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif; font-weight:900; text-transform:uppercase; -webkit-text-stroke:1px black; paint-order:stroke fill; font-size:1.1em; color:rgb(40,160,60);" {{!}} {{{hp}}}🤍
}}
{{#if:{{{react_rules|}}}|
{{!}}-
! colspan="3" style="padding:6px 10px; background:rgb(160,40,100); text-align:left; font-family:'Inter',system-ui,sans-serif; font-weight:700; font-size:0.85em; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:2px; position:relative;" {{!}} REACT{{#if:{{{react_cost|}}}|<span style="position:absolute; right:6px; top:50%; transform:translateY(-50%); background:rgb(30,100,220); border-radius:50%; width:22px; height:22px; border:1.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.4); display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; font-size:11px; font-weight:900; letter-spacing:0;">{{{react_cost}}}</span>}}
{{!}}-
{{!}} colspan="3" style="padding:6px 10px; background:rgba(160,40,100,0.15); border:1px solid rgba(160,40,100,0.3); font-size:0.9em;" {{!}} {{{react_rules}}}
}}
{{!}}}


{{DISPLAYTITLE:{{{name|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}{{DEFAULTSORT:{{{name|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}{{#set:Name={{{name|{{PAGENAME}}}}} }}{{#if:{{{stable_id|}}}|{{#set:StableId={{{stable_id}}} }}}}{{#if:{{{type|}}}|{{#set:CardType={{{type}}} }}}}{{#if:{{{element|}}}|{{#set:Element={{{element}}} }}}}{{{tribe_annotations|}}}{{#if:{{{cost|}}}|{{#set:ManaCost={{{cost}}} }}}}{{#if:{{{attack|}}}|{{#set:Attack={{{attack}}} }}}}{{#if:{{{hp|}}}|{{#set:HP={{{hp}}} }}}}{{#if:{{{range|}}}|{{#set:Range={{{range}}} }}}}{{#if:{{{art|}}}|{{#set:ArtFile=File:{{{art}}} }}}}{{#if:{{{patch|}}}|{{#set:FirstPatch={{{patch}}} }}}}{{#if:{{{last_changed_patch|}}}|{{#set:LastChangedPatch={{{last_changed_patch}}} }}}}{{#if:{{{deckable|}}}|{{#set:Deckable={{{deckable}}} }}}}{{{keyword_annotations|}}}{{#set:LastModified={{CURRENTTIMESTAMP}} }}{{#ifeq:{{{deprecated|}}}|1|[[Category:Deprecated]]|[[Category:Card]]}}{{#if:{{{element|}}}|[[Category:{{{element}}} cards]]}}{{#if:{{{type|}}}|[[Category:{{{type}}}s]]}}</includeonly>
